title: Gestation bin
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Gestation bins''' were birthing chamber [[biot]]s used in [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[grashal]]s. Developed by the [[Shaper caste]], these bins were used to grow [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] of the species that were native to their [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|galaxy]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]'' {{C|[[Flow-walking|Flow-walk]]}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
